text: Spin-off: "cross-repo link at the seam" option
description: Deferred remainder of the basic spin-off. Instead of dropping connections that cross the seam (a copied aim that supported an ancestor left behind in the source, e.g. B->A), offer a dialog option to preserve them as cross-repo links (repoId-tagged edges, see 5a45cb28) so the spun-off branch stays connected to what it used to serve. Postponed until basic spin-off + cross-repo edges land.

status.comment: Parked 2026-06-27: repo-level-links-only pivot. Preserving a seam edge B→A (A an uncopied ancestor) as a cross-repo AIM link no longer matches the model — a repo-only link can't target ancestor aim A specifically. Reconsider as a whole-repo link to the source repo if/when this is revisited.
